name: ScoZinc Mining Ltd.
summary: ScoZinc Mining Ltd. engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for zinc and lead deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the ScoZinc project located in Nova Scotia. The company was formerly known as Selwyn Resources Ltd. and changed its name to ScoZinc Mining Ltd. in September 2015. ScoZinc Mining Ltd. is headquartered in Halifax, Canada.
